history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, selfie-style portrait of a young East Asian man with dark, neatly styled hair, featuring a slight undercut on the sides and a voluminous top swept to the side. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a white undershirt peeking out at the collar, and a silver chain necklace with a unique, abstract pendant. He has a silver hoop earring in his left ear. His skin is smooth with a natural, subtle blush on his cheeks and lips. The lighting is soft and diffused, coming from above and slightly to the front, highlighting his facial features and creating a gentle glow. The background appears to be an indoor space with a modern, minimalist aesthetic; the ceiling is a neutral gray with recessed lighting fixtures, and there are hints of a light-colored wall and possibly a mirror or window reflecting light. The overall mood is casual, youthful, and slightly posed, with a hint of a confident, gentle gaze directed towards the camera. The color palette is dominated by neutral grays and blacks, with the soft tones of his skin and lips providing a touch of warmth.
